title: スプシ保存先をDriveフォルダに変更し、全シートに最終編集日時カラムを追加

checks.name: no_alert_confirm_prompt
checks.command: grep -q 'alert(' app.html && echo 'FAIL' || (grep -q 'confirm(' app.html && echo 'FAIL' || (grep -q 'prompt(' app.html && echo 'FAIL' || echo 'PASS'))

checks.name: folder_creation_code
checks.command: grep -q '料理レシピ・食材管理_Canvasアプリ' app.html && echo 'PASS' || echo 'FAIL'

checks.name: last_edited_header_inventory
checks.command: grep -q "'最終編集日時'" app.html && echo 'PASS' || echo 'FAIL'

checks.name: no_individual_spreadsheet_writes
checks.command: grep -n 'appendRow\|deleteRow\|setValue\|setValues\|SpreadsheetApp' app.html | grep -v 'syncPendingChanges' | grep -v 'handleInit' | grep -v 'loadSchedule' | wc -l | awk '{if($1==0) print "PASS"; else print "FAIL"}'
